narrative:
Millcreek (precinct in Union County) has 1,011 registered voters, with 45.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 45.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 35.7 percentage points.
